content.rendered:
Citizenship by Investment

Secure your dream destination's citizenship with our fast-track CBI Program, and take advantage of visa-free access to 145+ countries including UK, Europe, China, UAE, Hong Kong, Singapore and other.

Get a Consultation
Our Programmes

CITIZENSHIP BY INVESTMENT

Gain a second passport and global mobility through our Citizenship by Investment Program, which offers financial freedom and extends beyond the Caribbean to include Turkey and Vanuatu, the only country in the Asia-Pacific region that provides this facility. Invest in businesses, real estate, or approved charities by relevant government bodies to qualify for citizenship in countries with some of the strongest passports worldwide.

Our 2nd Citizenship Programmes

St. Lucia

Most Reliable 2nd Passport

Minimum Investment: $250,000

Visa-free Travel: 145+ Countries

Processing Timeline: 90 – 120 Days

View Program

Commonwealth of Dominica

No. 1 Choice of Investors

Minimum Investment: $200,000

Visa-Free Travel: 145+ Countries

Processing Timeline: 90 Days

View Program

Antigua and Barbuda

Ensure Economic Stability & Comfort

Minimum Investment: $230,000

Visa-Free Travel: 150+ Countries

Processing Timeline: 3 Months

View Program

St. Kitts & Nevis

Caribbean Island with USA E2 Treaty

Minimum Investment: $250,000

Visa-Free Travel: 150+ Countries

Processing Timeline: 3-4 Months

View Program

Grenada

Caribbean Island with USA E2 Treaty

Minimum Investment: $235,000

Visa-Free Travel: 115+ Countries

Processing Timeline: 3-4 Months

View Program

Vanuatu

Most Economical 2nd Passport

Minimum Investment: $130,000

Visa-Free Travel: 113+ Countries

Processing Timeline: 60-90 Days

View Program

Republic of Turkiye

Everyone’s Dream Destination 

Minimum Investment: $400,000

Visa-Free Travel: 111+ Countries

Processing Timeline: 90 Days

View Program

Nauru

Most Economical 2nd Passport

Minimum Investment: $105,000

Visa-Free Travel: 80+ Countries

Processing Timeline: 3-4 Months

View Program

Speak to a global expert

Let us guide you through every step of your journey toward new opportunities abroad, ensuring a seamless transition into your next chapter.

Get a Consultation

Benefits of 2nd Citizenship

Travel Freedom

Travel around the world with visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to more than 145 countries including the UK, Schengen Zone, China, Singapore, etc.

Business Growth

Invest in our Citizenship by Investment programs to unlock business expansion opportunities in economically stable environments.

Education and Healthcare

Enjoy lifelong opportunities of residing in prosperous nations such as top-tier education and healthcare for you and your family.

Tax Benefits

Benefit from reduced taxes or complete exemption on your income, capital gains, gifts, wealth, and inheritance.

Retain Dual Citizenship

The majority of our programs offer irrevocable citizenship, allowing you the privilege to retain your original citizenship(s).

Political Stability

Acquire citizenship in countries known for their political stability, safety, and secure environment offering peace of mind for you and your family.
